name: Bean Thread Noodles with Pork
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the noodles in a large bowl of warm water for 15 minutes.
2. Drain and discard the water once the noodles are soft.
3. In a wok or large saute pan, heat the peanut oil.
4. Add the ground pork and stir-fry until browned.
5. Stir in the dark soy sauce, rice wine, sesame oil, ginger, garlic, scallions, chili bean sauce, salt, sugar, and additional sesame oil.
6. Pour in the chicken stock and bring to a simmer.
7. Cook until most of the liquid has evaporated.
8. Transfer the dish to a serving bowl.
9. Garnish with finely chopped scallions.
10. Serve and enjoy. Makes 2 to 4 servings.
